Description: Part of the primary key representing the specific date on which attendance was recorded.
The monetary cost of admission for the exhibition.
Primary key that uniquely identifies each artist in the database.
Foreign key referencing the artist table that identifies the artist associated with this exhibition.
The full name of the artist.
The count of visitors or attendees for the exhibition on the specified date.
The year in which the artist joined the organization or platform.
The age of the artist at the time of the record.
Part of the primary key and foreign key referencing the exhibition table, identifying the specific exhibition event.
Primary key that uniquely identifies each exhibition event.
The calendar year in which the exhibition took place.
The country associated with the artist, such as United States or Fiji.
The subject or title theme of the exhibition, such as Christmas or Spring.
